# Brownfield Migration Spec — a legacy billing and collections monolith on WebLogic 12

## Application Summary
a legacy billing and collections monolith on WebLogic 12

## Modernization Scope
all three integrations are in scope this iteration

## Integration Inventory

### Integration: INT-001 — Billing UI
- **Technology + version:** JSF on WebLogic 12
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** bidirectional
- **Criticality:** high
- **Coexistence constraint:** hard-cutover
- **API surface / contract:** internal pages
- **State management:** session sticky
- **Data volume + SLA:** 1.5M page views/day p95 < 700ms
- **Target intent:** React SPA on CloudFront
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-002 — Collections engine
- **Technology + version:** Spring Batch 4 on WebLogic 12
- **Integration type:** batch
- **Data flow direction:** read-only
- **Criticality:** critical
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-read
- **API surface / contract:** internal jobs
- **State management:** stateless
- **Data volume + SLA:** nightly 3M accounts batch SLA 4h
- **Target intent:** AWS Batch on Fargate
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-003 — Payment gateway
- **Technology + version:** IBM MQ 9.1 producer
- **Integration type:** async messaging
- **Data flow direction:** write-only
- **Criticality:** high
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-write
- **API surface / contract:** message contract documented
- **State management:** stateless
- **Data volume + SLA:** 400K payments/day
- **Target intent:** AWS SQS producer
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

## Non-Functional Requirements (Application-Wide)
- exit the on-prem datacenter by Q4
